function createBatch(bytes32 batchId, address farmer, string calldata metadataURI) external
function addProcessingEvent(bytes32 batchId, string calldata metadataURI) external
function addLabReport(bytes32 batchId, string calldata reportHash, string calldata status) external
function batches(bytes32) external view returns (bytes32 batchId, address farmer, string memory metadataURI, bool exists)
event BatchCreated(bytes32 indexed batchId, address indexed farmer, string metadataURI)
event ProcessingEventAdded(bytes32 indexed batchId, string metadataURI)
event LabReportAdded(bytes32 indexed batchId, string reportHash, string status)
